title: obione × aptera
intro: Obione × aptera, also known as sea purslane, is a perennial succulent plant that is native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing due to its high content of antioxidants and amino acids. The health benefits of Obione × aptera include its potential to help manage diabetes, lower cholesterol levels, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and stems in hot water, and it can also be used topically as a salve or ointment to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
